basic_details.job_title: District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 18 Junior Clerk cum Copyist, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Stenographer Grade-III & Salaried Amin
basic_details.short_information: District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website angul.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Stenographer Grade-III & Salaried Amin posts through the District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/SEBC/Women candidates; as per rules for PWD and Ex-serviceman.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute, Matriculation
qualification.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Must have passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute. Stenographer Grade-III: Must have passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University, Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute, minimum speed of 80 words per minute in shorthand and 40 words per minute in typewriting. Salaried Amin: Must have passed matriculation or equivalent from a recognized Board, Revenue Inspector Training and knowledge in Computer Operation.

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- (Level 4) Per Month Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level 7) Per Month Salaried Amin: Rs. 21,700/- to Rs. 69,100/- (Level 5) Per Month

selection_process: Written competitive examination Computer Science Test (Practical) Shorthand and Typewriting Test (for Stenographer Grade-III) Viva-voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District & Sessions Judge Angul Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://angul.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026 is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 18 vacancies are available for the posts of Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Stenographer Grade-III, and Salaried Amin in the District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years for all the posts announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post. For Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, +3 and a Diploma in Computer Application are required. For Stenographer Grade-III, +3, Diploma in Computer Application, and shorthand/typewriting speeds are needed. For Salaried Amin, Matriculation, Revenue Inspector Training, and computer knowledge are essential.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 81,100/- per month, depending on the post and its corresponding pay level as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the District & Sessions Judge Angul Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written competitive examination, a Computer Science Test (Practical), a Shorthand and Typewriting Test (for Stenographer Grade-III), and a Viva-voce Test.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for these government jobs?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: 5 years for SC/ST/SEBC/Women candidates, and as per rules for PWD and Ex-serviceman.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District & Sessions Judge Angul, which is https://angul.dcourts.gov.in.
